triggers: A user reports a runtime error, crash, unexpected output, or broken behavior
A test fails unexpectedly because the source code is incorrect

block_if: Do not change public API surface
safe_defaults: Do not delete files without explicit authorization

slots.description: The reported symptom: error message, traceback, blank page, timeout, or crash

evidence.quote: Read and understand the reported symptom.
evidence.rationale: Agent needs to know what went wrong before it can fix it

slots.name: failure_symptom

slots.description: What changes are permitted: source-only, tests allowed, public API changes

evidence.quote: Do not modify test expectations unless explicitly authorized.
evidence.rationale: Scope of allowed changes determines valid fix approaches

slots.name: allowed_change_scope

slots.description: Which source files or module should be investigated

evidence.quote: Reproduce the failure using the smallest relevant command.
evidence.rationale: Agent needs scope to focus investigation effort

slots.name: target_scope

activation_triggers: A user reports a runtime error, crash, unexpected output, or broken behavior
A test fails unexpectedly because the source code is incorrect
execution_steps: Read and understand the reported symptom.
Reproduce the failure using the smallest relevant command.
Do not modify test expectations unless explicitly authorized.
Report the fix and verification result.
output_requirements: Root cause analysis with evidence from source files
A minimal source change that fixes the reported behavior
The relevant test command and its result
safety_constraints: Do not modify tests unless explicitly authorized
Do not change public API surface
Prefer minimal source changes over broad refactors
verification_statements: Run the smallest relevant test command
